headers.description: OAuth 2.1 bearer token. Most clients negotiate this automatically via Dynamic Client Registration; the well-known metadata at /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server drives discovery.

tenant.description: Your Cognethics tenant subdomain (e.g. 'gtm'). Issued at account provisioning; contact noreply@cognethics.com for onboarding.
